DataSource.Query: from IdentityRequest spr, IdentityRequestItem spri, Identity si1,Identity si2 where spr.id = spri.name and si1.id = spr.requesterId and si2.id = spr.targetId and spri.approvalState = 'Finished' and spr.executionStatus = 'Completed' and spri.name = 'assignedRoles'

QueryScript.Source: import java.util.Objects; query = query + " and ( (spri.value) like 'TEST%' or (spri.value) like 'BR%' or (spri.value) like 'BT%') "

ReportColumnConfig.property: (Select si1.pp_usr_login from IdentityRequest spr, IdentityRequestItem spri, Identity si1,Identity si2 WHERE spr.id = spri.name and si1.id = spr.requesterId and si2.id = spr.targetId and spri.approvalState = 'Finished' and spr.executionStatus = 'Completed' and spri.name = 'assignedRoles' AND ( spri.value LIKE 'TEST%' OR spri.value LIKE 'BR%' OR spri.value LIKE 'BT%'))

(Select si2.pp_usr_login from spt_identity_request spr, spt_identity_request_item spri, spt_identity si1,spt_identity si2 WHERE spr.id = spri.identity_request_id AND si1.id = spr.requester_id AND si2.id = spr.target_id AND spri.approval_state = 'Finished' AND spr.execution_status = 'Completed' AND spri.name = 'assignedRoles' AND ( upper(spri.value) LIKE 'TEST%' OR upper(spri.value) LIKE 'BR%' OR upper(spri.value) LIKE 'BT%'))
